node.statement: (BP for quantum N-combs) An N-comb (CDP 2008/2009) is a PSD process matrix W subject to nested trace conditions, all linear. For an extreme N-comb, rank(W)² ≤ m where m is the total number of real-linear constraints from the CDP hierarchy. For N=1 this recovers Choi's theorem; for N=2 it bounds superchannel complexity.
